- Row 3: Target has (□ X X X X), Distractor 1 has (□ X X X X) - same, Distractor 2 has (□ X □ □ X)

Another way to look at it: the target has a complete empty row (row 4), which neither distractor has.

content.text: Expression: The grid with a completely empty fourth row
